cfg.start_enabled.name: Start Enabled
cfg.start_enabled.desc: Show the efficiency numbers as soon as you load a save. Turn off if you'd rather start with them hidden and press the key when you want them.
cfg.show_percentage.name: Show Percentage
cfg.show_percentage.desc: Show work efficiency as a percentage, e.g. 75%.
cfg.show_skulls.name: Show Skulls
cfg.show_skulls.desc: Show the white-skull count behind the efficiency (40 skulls = 100%).
cfg.show_speed.name: Show Speed
cfg.show_job.name: Show Job
cfg.show_job.desc: Show the station each zombie is working at, or Idle when it isn't assigned to one.
cfg.colour_by_efficiency.name: Colour by Efficiency
cfg.colour_by_efficiency.desc: Tint the numbers from red (low) to green (high). Turn off for plain white.
cfg.text_size.name: Text Size
cfg.text_size.desc: Size of the efficiency numbers. 1.0 is the default; raise for bigger, lower for smaller.
cfg.vertical_offset.name: Vertical Offset
cfg.vertical_offset.desc: How far above each zombie's head the number sits. Raise it if the text overlaps the head.
cfg.horizontal_offset.name: Horizontal Offset
cfg.horizontal_offset.desc: Nudge the number left or right. Negative moves it left, positive moves it right.
cfg.toggle_overlay_keybind.name: Toggle Overlay Keybind
cfg.toggle_overlay_keybind.desc: Keyboard key that shows or hides the efficiency numbers over your zombies.
cfg.toggle_overlay_controller_button.des: Controller button that shows or hides the efficiency numbers over your zombies.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log while you play.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
